PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ext="${file##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "go" ]; then gofmt -w "$file" 2>> "$HOME/.claude/hooks/format-errors.log"; elif [ "$ext" = "ts" ] || [ "$ext" = "tsx" ]; then cd "${file%/*}" && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>> "$HOME/.claude/hooks/format-errors.log"; fi'

bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ext="${file##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "go" ]; then golangci-lint run --out-format= "$file" 2>> "$HOME/.claude/hooks/lint-errors.log"; elif [ "$ext" = "ts" ] || [ "$ext" = "tsx" ]; then cd "${file%/*}" && npx eslint "$file" 2>> "$HOME/.claude/hooks/lint-errors.log"; fi'
